title: bib-verify: Catch hallucinated and AI-generated citations in BibTeX files
description: A Claude Code plugin and standalone Python tool that verifies BibTeX entries against academic databases (Crossref, arXiv, OpenAlex, PubMed) and flags LLM-style citation patterns including placeholder identifiers, fake co-author lists, entry-type confusion, and identifier hijacking (working DOI pointing to a different paper). Implements field-level C/M/F/P/S/X classification per Chen et al. 2026 and the co-occurrence hallucination detector.

creators.name: Kondrateva, Ekaterina
creators.affiliation: Maastricht University Medical Centre+, GROW Research Institute for Oncology and Reproduction
